title: Matera's Jump into the U.S. Market
excerpt: TechCrunch's Mary Ann Azevedo dives into Matera's expansion into the U.S. and their new instant payment solutions they bring to the market.
body:
TechCrunch's Mary Ann Azevedo dives into Matera's expansion into the U.S. and their new instant payment solutions they bring to the market.

Read the full article [here](https://techcrunch.com/2022/12/11/fintech-interchange-startups/).
